description:
Legal document in Arabic script, maybe starting with اقر. Nearly complete. Involves several people and the receipt of money. There is a blank space on line three and two witness statements at the bottom. 

Verso is filled with notations of payments toward the rent of a house (unrated al-bayt) by 'al-shaykh al-muʿallim [...]' written in both Arabic script and Judaeo-Arabic. It also mentions ورق and dates in the margin (wa-thālith, wa-arbaʿa, wa-khāmis). Potentially related to recto. (AP)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
